title: Altered Pokemon [Cobblemon Addon]
description: This is a Data Pack for Cobblemon that adds Altered Pokemon to the game!
body:
**The Altered Pokemon make an Appearence!**

This addon adds the Altered Pokemon from my own personal project: Pokemon Twilight, as well as workin Minimap icons that go along with E19 Cobblemon Minimap Icons 

The Altered Pokemon in the pack so far are:

- Altered Ralts - Ghost
- Altered Kirlia - Ghost
- Altered Gardevoir - Ghost/Fire
- Altered Gallade - Ghost/Ice
- Altered Eevee A - Normal
- Altered Eevee B - Normal
- Altered Umbreon - Dark/Fairy
- Altered Espeon - Phychic/Fire

There are also custom Mega Evolutions that can be access with the use of Mega Showdown:

- _Altered Mega Gardevoir - Ghost/Fire_
- _Altered Mega Gallade - Ghost/Ice_
- _Mega Flygon - Ground/Dragon_

![An image showin all the Altered Pokemon as of v1.2 of the Addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/914c3b2afb541c56e44a6789586fb04e8470a0bb_0.webp)

This Data Pack is somethin that I made for fun and I plan to add more to in the future, such as Megas, more Altered Pokemon, New Moves and Abilies, and maybe even some structures too. Either way I hope ya'll enjoy this little addon

Despite this addon havin compability with Mega Showdown, it IS NOT REQUIRED! Havin it will only allow you to have access to the custom Mega Evolutions, Moves and Abilities, everythin else will work without it!

_Also left a little Easter Egg to Loomian Legacy lol_
